name: alert
description: Inline alert banner with success, error, warning, and info variants. Supports title, description, custom icon, and dismissible state.

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic color variant of the alert banner

props.name: title
props.description: Primary heading text of the alert

props.name: description
props.description: Secondary body text displayed below the title

props.name: dismissible
props.description: When true, renders a dismiss (✕) button

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Callback invoked when the dismiss button is pressed; requires dismissible to be true

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the alert container

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom icon string overriding the default variant icon
